name: Tianli Education International Holdings Limited
summary: Tianli Education International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides private education services in China. The company offers K-12 education services; and tutoring services for K-12 students and pre-kindergarten children, as well as management services. As of December 31, 2020, it had a network of 32 K-12 schools, which administered 20 high school programs, 24 middle school programs, 27 elementary school programs, and 7 kindergarten programs; 5 self-owned tutorial centers; and 3 franchised early childhood education centers. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.
